_meta.note: Curated copy of the awesome list of tmux plugins. Specs are GitHub user/repo. Refresh by re-running `python -m dmux.tools.refresh_awesome_catalog` (or hand-edit). dmux merges this with the live tmux-plugins org repos at runtime.

plugins.description: Monitor activity in sessions and panes with ActivityWatch.
View and control your tmux session from your mobile.
Modern tab manager with a daemon-driven vertical sidebar, window grouping, and full mouse support.
Watches your tmux configuration file and automatically reloads it on change.
Web browser sessions attached to tmux sessions.
Plugin for executing cargo commands.
Kill hanging processes fast.
Manage and interact with Devcontainers.
A popup floating terminal window in tmux.
Quickly open any path on your terminal window in your $EDITOR of choice.
Use fzf to manage tmux environment.
Open any kind of link with editor/browser via fzf; rewrite of tmux-fzf-url with more flexibility.
Open files in neovim parsed from terminal output using fzf for selection.
Quickly open any URL on your terminal window using fzf.
Move panes effortlessly between windows using a cut/paste clipboard flow.
Automatically fetches currently open git repositories on your tmux session.
Easy logging and screen capturing.
Popup menus for hard-to-remember commands and custom actions.
Seamless mouse scroll.
Integration of lazygit with tmux and neovim.
Nerd Font icons for your tmux windows.
Notify you when processes complete.
Open files in an nvim pane. Pairs well with tmux-open or tmux-fingers.
Tmux key bindings for quick opening of a highlighted file or url.
Resize panes on focus.
Zoom pane to separate window, then unzoom it back to its original location.
Basic tmux settings everyone can agree on.
Sidebar with directory tree for the current path. Makes tmux more IDE-like.
Tiling window manager features and intuitive keybindings for your tmux workflow.
Select actions from a customizable popup menu.
Names your tmux windows smartly.
Download files and directories with magic wormhole.
Script playbooks for frequent commands in any terminal application.
Tmux plugin manager.
Sidebar with the modern Nvim-Tree file explorer for the current path.
Select text from your window by fuzzy matching with fzf — no mouse.
Better mouse responsivity in tmux.
Enhances tmux search.
Multi-utility rapid copy toolkit (tmux-copytk).
easymotion-style text copying.
Copy to system clipboard. Works on macOS, Linux, and Cygwin.
Vimium/Easymotion-like navigation for tmux.
Execute complex tmux commands with a modal mode.
Switch window or session by clicking right mouse button and swiping.
Standard pane key-bindings for tmux.
Smart session manager for the terminal.
Persist and restore AI coding assistant sessions (Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex CLI).
Environment setup tool for pre-configuring windows and panes.
Make new tmux windows and panes inherit the active conda environment.
Continuous saving of tmux environment. Automatic restore on tmux start.
Open or create a tmux session with fzf via popup menu.
tmux-resurrect extension for named snapshot support.
Alternative to tmux-suspend; supports arbitrary levels of nesting.
Persists tmux environment across system restarts.
One prefix for all session creation, naming, switching, etc using fzf & zoxide.
Lightweight utils for manipulating sessions.
A tmux session manager with zoxide support, preview, fuzzy finding, and more.
Suspend local tmux session to work with nested remote tmux session.
Session manager with previews, integrations with tmuxinator, fzf, neovim.
Popup window session manager.
Update $DISPLAY for each pane when re-attaching to a tmux session.
Highly customizable tmux status bar framework.
Display ACPI info: thermal status, battery health/percentage, adapter status.
Display current aws-vault context and time remaining.
Plug and play battery percentage and icon indicator.
Display GPU status of bitahub in tmux status bar.
Plug and play CPU percentage and icon indicator.
Output of `df` in the status bar.
Display digit signs (⓪ ① ② …) in tmux status bar.
Flexible status-bar framework with #{status-left:…} helpers. Requires tmux-powerline-compiler.
Show public IP on status bar.
Show current keyboard layout in your status bar.
Add the current Kubernetes context and namespace to your status bar.
Counts files on a specific mail directory.
CPU, RAM, and load monitor for use with tmux.
Display prompt indicating currently active tmux mode.
Keep track of Mullvad VPN status.
Monitor upload and download speed of one or all interfaces.
Display newsboat counters in tmux status line.
Show currently playing track in tmux status bar with music controls.
Displays online status of your computer.
Displays packet loss % at or above a specified threshold.
Keep track of your Private Internet Access VPN status.
Shows average ping latency to a specified host.
Pomodoro timer with more options and stricter adherence to the technique.
Use Pomodoro technique with timer in tmux status bar.
Hackable status bar with dynamic powerline segments, written in bash.
Highlights when you press the tmux prefix key.
Visual session indicator with dots highlighting the current session.
Show currently playing song with Spotify-TUI.
Track popular market indexes and stock prices.
Display your system uptime in the tmux status line.
Quickly open any URL on your terminal window.
Display weather information in your terminal.
Displays your glucose level & direction from xDrip.
Soothing pastel theme for tmux.
Dracula dark theme for tmux.
Solarized theme for tmux.
A superhero-themed tmux colour theme.
Make tmux's theme follow macOS dark/light mode.
Arctic, north-bluish clean and elegant tmux color theme.
Nord theme with battery & pomodoro support.
Per-session color and style based on session name.
All natural pine, faux fur and a bit of soho vibes for the classy minimalist.
